commit_message: Changing use of others in core files to satisfy VCS Changing use of others in core files to satisfy VCS It seems that VCS is pickier about the use of `others` when there are multiple targets of it which don't have the same size. I modified a few files for the core (but not the other components) to be more verbose in their instantiations so that the core can pass through VCS.
